message:
fix(durability,embed,fusion): harden FSVI protection, model download validation, and refresh worker

Security and reliability hardening across three crates:

- durability/fsvi_protector.rs (+295 lines): new FSVI (File System
  Visibility Index) protection module implementing integrity checks,
  corruption detection, and safe recovery procedures for the index
  persistence layer
- embed/model_download.rs (+202 lines): harden model download logic
  with manifest validation, path traversal blocking, and checksum
  verification to prevent supply chain attacks via malicious model
  artifacts
- fusion/refresh.rs (+223 lines): improve refresh worker with SLO
  configuration validation, bounded retry logic, and defensive
  indexing to prevent unbounded resource consumption during index
  refresh cycles

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
